commands.repair_reason: No ClawSweeper repair lane is needed; the remaining work is ordinary maintainer landing with exact-head checks.; Cleared: The diff is limited to resolver logic, a focused unit test, and changelog text; it does not touch dependencies, workflows, secrets, install scripts, package resolution, or publishing metadata. commands.review_summary:
The PR changes shared capability-provider resolution so enabled manifest-backed image, video, and music generation providers are merged with already-active providers, plus a regression test and changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main is source-reproducible through active xai plus allowlisted fal: the generation resolver has no requested-provider collector, so the active-registry early return can hide fal before manifest discovery.
